name: American Rare Earths Limited
analysis: EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$0.3798. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$0.3758 where 6 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$0.3798, stop A$0.3415, target A$0.3950. Risk/reward is 0.40:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
